items.title: Polish PM pledges memorial to victims of WW2 'genocide by Ukrainian nationalists'
items.dek: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.
items.body: Warsaw and Kyiv have for decades been at loggerheads over the killings of many thousands of civilians during World War Two.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran supreme leader calls for revenge after father's burial
items.dek: Mojtaba Khamenei says vengeance is "inevitable" for the killing, which happened on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran.
items.body: Mojtaba Khamenei says vengeance is "inevitable" for the killing, which happened on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
items.dek: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.
items.body: Khanna, 49, was visiting the occupied West Bank when he was held for 90 minutes, he says.
